Google parent  Alphabet  the world’s third-largest stock, will update investors on its second quarter activity after the close of trading on Wednesday, likely a few minutes after Elon Musk’s  Tesla  posts results for the three months ending in June.  The reports will kick off a long stretch of big-ticket earnings releases, including  Microsoft Meta Platforms Amazon  and  Apple  next week, as investors face the market’s weeks-long stall.
